name: Puffco Plus 3.0 Ceramic Chamber
summary: Crafted with precision and care, the ceramic chamber of the Puffco Plus 3.0 ensures unparalleled purity and flavour in every draw.
description: Crafted with precision and care, the ceramic chamber of the Puffco Plus 3.0 ensures unparalleled purity and flavour in every draw. The ceramic material is renowned for its ability to preserve the delicate nuances of your favorite concentrates, delivering smooth, clean vapour with each session. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
